title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Vedantu - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Vedantu - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
